followups.subject: Closing the loop — Skipton Garden Design
followups.body:
Rachel,

I've dropped you a couple of notes about the mobile issue and the portfolio gap on the site — won't keep following up if the timing isn't right.

If things change down the line, or spring brings a burst of new enquiries and you want to capture more of them, you know where to find me.

All the best,
[Your name]
